full_prompt: Design an aluminum 7075-T7351 mounting bracket for a satellite equipment panel, per a representative European space-structural-component invitation to tender, satisfying ECSS-E-ST-32C structural requirements. The bracket mounts a 4 kg avionics box onto a satellite equipment panel. Envelope 200 x 150 x 60 mm. Interfaces: top-face avionics box pattern of four M5 inserts on 140 x 90 mm rectangle; bottom-face panel pattern of four M6 bolts on 180 x 130 mm rectangle. Material: aluminum 7075-T7351 with ECSS-E-HB-32-20C A-basis allowables (yield 434 MPa, UTS 496 MPa, Young's modulus 71.7 GPa, Poisson 0.33, density 2810 kg/m^3, elongation 8%). Load cases per ECSS-E-HB-32-26A Spacecraft Mechanical Loads Analysis Handbook and a representative ECSS-compliant ITT envelope: LC1 quasi-static 20 g along each principal axis applied to 4 kg lumped mass (= 785 N per axis); LC2 sine vibration 20 g 0-peak 5-100 Hz at base (per European launcher user manual envelope); LC3 random vibration PSD: 0.01 g^2/Hz from 20-100 Hz, +3 dB/oct to 0.04 g^2/Hz at 500 Hz, flat to 1000 Hz, -6 dB/oct to 0.01 g^2/Hz at 2000 Hz (total Grms approximately 7.3 g per typical ECSS ITT); LC4 thermal cycle -40 C to +80 C (delta-T = 120 K) with alpha_Al = 23.6e-6/K; LC5 acoustic load Lp = 140 dB OASPL 31.5-8000 Hz (typical European launcher fairing) - treated via Miles / modal if the agent chooses to include. Pass/fail per ECSS-E-ST-32C: (R1) max von Mises under any quasi-static case <= 496 / 1.25 = 397 MPa (ECSS ultimate SF 1.25); (R2) max von Mises <= 434 / 1.1 = 394.5 MPa (ECSS yield SF 1.1); (R3) random-vibration 3-sigma von Mises <= 397 MPa; (R4) first natural mode >= 140 Hz (ECSS typical bracket decoupling from spacecraft-bus primary modes); (R5) thermal-gradient + residual stress von Mises <= 397 MPa; (R6) mass <= 400 g (typical ECSS ITT target envelope mass for this class); (R7) margin-of-safety computed per ECSS-E-ST-32C section 4.3: MS = (allowable / (FOS * actual)) - 1 >= 0 for each load case. Deliverables: STEP AP242 + IGES, CAD neutral format for European space procurement; report with per-load-case MS, first mode frequency, random 3-sigma stress, mass, and compliance matrix against ECSS-E-ST-32C.
short_prompt:
Design an aluminum 7075-T7351 mounting bracket for a satellite equipment panel, satisfying ECSS-E-ST-32C structural requirements. The bracket mounts a 4 kg avionics box onto a satellite equipment panel.

Envelope: 200 x 150 x 60 mm. Top-face avionics pattern: four M5 inserts on 140 x 90 mm. Bottom-face panel pattern: four M6 bolts on 180 x 130 mm.

Material: 7075-T7351 per ECSS-E-HB-32-20C A-basis allowables.

Design per ECSS-E-ST-32C with ultimate SF 1.25 and yield SF 1.1.

Load cases per ECSS-E-HB-32-26A.
- LC1 quasi-static 20 g along each principal axis on 4 kg mass = 785 N per axis.
- LC2 sine vibration 20 g 0-peak 5-100 Hz at base (European launcher user-manual envelope).
- LC3 random vibration PSD: 0.01 g^2/Hz from 20-100 Hz, +3 dB/oct to 0.04 g^2/Hz at 500 Hz, flat to 1000 Hz, -6 dB/oct to 0.01 g^2/Hz at 2000 Hz (total ~7.3 Grms).
- LC4 thermal cycle -40 C to +80 C (delta-T = 120 K) with alpha_Al = 23.6e-6/K.
- LC5 acoustic load Lp = 140 dB OASPL 31.5-8000 Hz (optional, Miles or modal).

Additional gates: first natural mode >= 140 Hz; mass <= 400 g; margin-of-safety MS >= 0 for each load case per ECSS-E-ST-32C section 4.3.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: LC5 acoustic can be reduced to equivalent quasi-static via Miles approximation if acoustic FEM not run.

prompt.title: 7075-T7351 avionics mounting bracket per European space-structural ITT (ECSS-E-ST-32C)
prompt.brief: Design an aluminum bracket carrying a 4 kg avionics box on a satellite equipment panel, passing ECSS-E-ST-32C quasi-static, sine, random, thermal, and first-mode requirements with mass <= 400 g.

boundary_conditions.avionics_mass: 4 kg lumped at CG above bracket top face

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: ECSS typical bracket decoupling from spacecraft primary modes
ECSS ITT target mass envelope for this class

requirements.governing_standard: ECSS-E-ST-32C + ECSS-E-HB-32-20C (material allowables) + ECSS-E-HB-32-26A (loads handbook) + European launcher user manuals

exclusions_explained.radiation_analysis: Radiation material degradation out of scope.

notes.numeric_source: ECSS-E-ST-32C, ECSS-E-HB-32-26A loads handbook; European launcher user manuals; 7075-T7351 A-basis allowables (MMPDS-2019 / ECSS-E-HB-32-20C).
